parents.subject: LU-10482 tests: renumber sanity/56ea to avoid conflict

commit.subject: LU-10482 tests: renumber sanity/56e[bcd] to avoid conflict
commit.message:
LU-10482 tests: renumber sanity/56e[bcd] to avoid conflict

There are two sanity test_56ca() tests, which exposed issues with
the naming schema in this set of subtests - that some test_56XX
subtests are in the "abc" sequence of tests, and others are in
the "post-xyz" sequence of tests and using "aa, ab, ca, ...".

Rename test_56eb*(), test_56ec(), test_56ed to test_56E[bcd]()
to avoid future naming collisions.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: I2f08e48c5b735498afa53b1a36202a9ce83ebbe5
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/65277
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Akash B <akash-b@hpe.com>
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
